summary: Boot fails after failed software update
description: Partial OTA update leaves system unbootable. No rollback occurred.
root_cause: Update process not atomic. Failed update corrupted boot partition without rollback.

summary: Boot fails with device tree parsing error
description: Kernel fails to boot with device tree blob parsing error in boot logs.
root_cause: Device tree binary corrupted or incompatible version. DTB not matching kernel version.

summary: Audio format detection incorrect for AAC files
description: AAC audio files misidentified as MP3 causing playback failure.
root_cause: Media scanner magic number detection incorrect. AAC ADTS header not recognized.

summary: Cold boot much slower than warm boot
description: First boot after long power off takes 90 seconds. Warm reboots take normal 45 seconds.
root_cause: Cold boot performing hardware calibration and training. Results not persisted to speed up next boot.

description: After battery replacement or disconnect system fails to boot showing initialization error.
root_cause: NVRAM settings lost after power loss. Boot expecting config that doesn't exist.

summary: Bluetooth disconnects during phone software update
description: When phone receives software update Bluetooth disconnects and won't reconnect until reboot.
root_cause: Bluetooth stack not handling device disconnection gracefully. Connection state corrupted.

description: Camera preview causes memory leak. Memory usage increases while camera active.
root_cause: Camera frame buffers allocated but not released after frame processing complete.

description: External display connected via HDMI shows video but no audio output.
root_cause: HDMI audio infoframe not configured. Display not aware of audio availability.

summary: System runs out of memory during long trip
description: On drives longer than 4 hours system becomes sluggish and eventually crashes with OOM.
root_cause: Navigation history log growing unbounded in memory. Route history not pruned or moved to disk.

summary: FM Radio frequency drift during temperature change
description: FM Radio gradually drifts off station as cabin temperature increases. Auto-tuning doesn't compensate properly.
root_cause: RF oscillator temperature coefficient too high causing frequency drift. PLL calibration table missing temperature compensation values.

summary: Stack size too small for media processing
description: Video playback crashes with stack overflow in decoder thread.
root_cause: Media decoder thread stack size set to 64KB but requires 512KB for 4K video processing.

description: When BLE devices connected classic Bluetooth audio has stuttering and dropouts.
root_cause: BLE and Classic Bluetooth sharing same RF channels without proper coexistence management.

description: Boot fails with ramdisk too large error on systems with limited memory.
root_cause: Ramdisk includes unnecessary debug tools and files. Should be minimized for production.

description: Switching from music to call causes Bluetooth to disconnect completely and reconnect.
root_cause: Profile switch triggering full Bluetooth stack reset. Should be seamless transition.

description: Bluetooth audio has periodic stuttering every 30-60 seconds.
root_cause: Bluetooth audio thread priority too low. Audio processing delayed by other tasks.

summary: Sirius XM channel guide not loading
description: Satellite radio channel guide shows loading indefinitely. Channels playable but no metadata.
root_cause: XM metadata service timing out. TCP connection not established due to firewall blocking port 8080.

summary: Bluetooth refuses connection when battery low
description: When vehicle battery below 11V Bluetooth won't accept connections.
root_cause: Power management policy disabling Bluetooth during low battery condition.

summary: Boot takes longer with many USB devices connected
description: Each USB device connected adds 3-5 seconds to boot time.
root_cause: USB device enumeration happening serially during boot. Should be parallel or async.

description: Enabling weather widget on home screen causes random crashes in unrelated applications.
root_cause: Weather widget writing beyond allocated buffer. Heap corruption affecting other application memory.

description: Caller audio volume during hands-free calls extremely quiet even at maximum setting.
root_cause: HFP audio path gain set incorrectly. Microphone and speaker gains not calibrated.

summary: Voice command audio feedback very quiet
description: System beep and voice responses to voice commands barely audible.
root_cause: Voice feedback audio stream routed to wrong output. Volume level not configured for feedback channel.

summary: Audio spectrum analyzer causing CPU spike
description: Enabling audio visualizer causes UI lag and high CPU usage.
root_cause: Spectrum analyzer running FFT on main thread blocking UI updates. Should use worker thread.

description: Phone connects but audio won't stream to vehicle. A2DP profile connection fails.
root_cause: A2DP SBC encoder initialization failing. Codec library missing or incompatible version.

summary: Secure element initialization timeout at boot
description: Boot hangs for 30 seconds waiting for secure element hardware to respond.
root_cause: SE hardware initialization timeout too long. Should fail faster and retry in background.

summary: Boot kernel panics with MMC read error
description: Intermittent kernel panic during boot with eMMC read timeout error.
root_cause: eMMC storage device developing bad blocks. Hardware failure requiring replacement.

description: SQLite database cache consuming 500MB+ memory. Queries become slower over time.
root_cause: Database cache size not configured with upper limit. Cache grows unbounded in memory.

description: During boot animation strange visual glitches and artifacts appear on screen.
root_cause: Frame buffer not cleared before boot animation starts. Contains random memory contents.

description: Audio playback has 500ms latency between command and sound output.
root_cause: ALSA buffer size set too large (4096 frames). Should be 256-512 for low latency.

description: FM Radio plays much louder than Bluetooth at same volume level setting. Inconsistent loudness.
root_cause: Source-specific volume calibration not applied. Audio output gain not normalized across sources.

summary: Bluetooth headset button controls not working
description: Play/pause button on Bluetooth headset has no effect. Only works for phone calls.
root_cause: AVRCP passthrough commands not mapped to media player controls.

description: Kernel memory continuously decreasing even when no applications running. System unstable after 48 hours uptime.
root_cause: GPU kernel driver allocating DMA buffers without proper cleanup. Memory never returned to system.

summary: Boot fails with TPM initialization error
description: Trusted Platform Module init fails causing boot to halt with security error.
root_cause: TPM firmware version incompatible with platform. Requires TPM firmware update.

description: DMA zones depleted while normal zones have free memory causing allocation failures.
root_cause: Zone allocation policy too strict. Should allow fallback to other zones when preferred zone full.

summary: Phone book access blocked by permissions
description: Cannot download contacts from phone via Bluetooth PBAP.
root_cause: Android PBAP permissions not granted. User not prompted for contact access permission.

description: When low memory occurs OOM killer terminates critical system services instead of apps.
root_cause: OOM score adjustment not configured. Critical services have default killable priority.

summary: Audio focus not released after navigation prompt
description: After navigation announcement media doesn't resume playing automatically. Must manually press play.
root_cause: Navigation audio focus not being abandoned after prompt completion. Focus release callback not invoked.

description: Other devices take long time to discover this vehicle during Bluetooth scan.
root_cause: Inquiry scan interval too long. Device not discoverable responsive enough.

description: Bluetooth file transfer speeds only reaching 100KB/s should be 2-3MB/s.
root_cause: Bluetooth Enhanced Data Rate not enabled. Falling back to basic rate limiting throughput.

summary: Bluetooth message access profile not working
description: Cannot read SMS messages via Bluetooth MAP.
root_cause: MAP profile not implemented. Only PBAP and HFP profiles available in build.

description: IPC message queue fills up causing message loss and application crashes.
root_cause: Message queue depth too shallow for burst traffic. Messages dropped when queue full.

description: System watchdog resets system during boot before initialization complete.
root_cause: Boot process exceeds watchdog timeout. Watchdog should be refreshed during long init steps.

description: Multiple paired phones all auto-connect causing conflicts. Priority order not respected.
root_cause: Device priority list not consulted during connection. First responding device connects.

summary: Audio keeps playing during reverse camera activation
description: When shifting to reverse audio continues playing should mute for parking sensor tones.
root_cause: Reverse gear signal from CAN not triggering audio mute. Event handler not registered for gear position changes.

description: Boot messages disappear when switching from serial to framebuffer console.
root_cause: Console switch losing early boot messages. Buffer not flushed before switch.

description: Bluetooth scan never stops draining phone battery. Scan indicator always visible.
root_cause: Bluetooth scan not stopped after device found. Scan stop command not being issued.

description: Opening more than 5 browser tabs causes out of memory crash.
root_cause: Web browser not limiting per-tab memory allocation. No memory pressure response.

description: Applications able to allocate unlimited memory causing OOM killer to activate.
root_cause: cgroup memory limits not configured. No per-process memory accounting.

summary: Bluetooth pairing PIN code not displaying
description: When pairing new device PIN code popup doesn't appear. Pairing fails with timeout.
root_cause: Bluetooth pairing dialog not shown due to UI thread deadlock in display manager.

summary: File descriptor leak in telemetry service
description: Telemetry service accumulating open file descriptors eventually hitting process limit.
root_cause: Telemetry log files opened for each metric but never closed. FD table exhaustion.

description: UI freezes for 5-10 seconds periodically. Logs show garbage collector running during freeze.
root_cause: Java heap size too large causing long GC pauses. Heap should be tuned smaller for better responsiveness.

description: Background worker thread count continuously increases. Thread creation eventually fails.
root_cause: Thread pool not reaping idle threads. Completed tasks leave zombie threads in pool.

summary: Audio routing switches randomly between speakers
description: Audio output randomly jumps between front and rear speakers without user input.
root_cause: Audio mixer routing state machine corruption. Race condition in route update logic.

description: Display memory usage increases 5MB per hour. After 20 hours system becomes unstable.
root_cause: Wayland compositor surface buffers not destroyed when windows close. GPU memory leak.

summary: Bluetooth secure connections pairing always fails
description: Pairing with devices requiring Secure Connections (BT 4.2+) fails.
root_cause: Bluetooth stack Secure Connections mode disabled. Only legacy pairing supported.

description: High quality aptX Bluetooth audio codec available but always falls back to SBC.
root_cause: aptX library not linked in build configuration. Codec negotiation failing to SBC fallback.

summary: Audio ducking too aggressive during alerts
description: Alert sounds completely mute music instead of reducing volume.
root_cause: Audio ducking configured for 100% attenuation instead of 20-30% reduction.

summary: USB audio file tags showing corrupted text
description: ID3 tags for USB audio files display garbled characters for artist and album names.
root_cause: Character encoding not detected correctly. UTF-8 tags interpreted as ASCII causing mojibake.

description: System logs consuming 10GB+ causing root partition to fill completely.
root_cause: systemd journal size not limited. Logs growing unbounded without rotation.

summary: Bluetooth audio video sync when casting
description: Video cast from phone to display out of sync with Bluetooth audio by 500ms.
root_cause: No A/V sync mechanism between different protocols. Bluetooth audio not delayed to match video.

description: Network firewall rules causing kernel memory leak over time.
root_cause: Connection tracking table entries not being garbage collected properly.

description: Every volume adjustment produces clicking sound through speakers.
root_cause: Volume change applied instantaneously causing audio discontinuity. Should use smooth ramping.

summary: Init ramdisk running out of space
description: Early boot fails with ramdisk full error during initialization.
root_cause: Ramdisk size too small for initialization scripts and temporary files.

summary: Boot console output missing on serial port
description: Serial console shows no boot messages. Screen blank until boot complete.
root_cause: Serial port not initialized early enough in boot. Console output buffered but not displayed.

description: Verified boot process takes 15 seconds to verify boot image signature.
root_cause: Hash verification using SHA-256 on full 200MB image. Should use chunked hash tree.

summary: System property initialization race at boot
description: Random boot failures with uninitialized property access errors.
root_cause: Service starting before property service fully initialized. Boot dependency chain incorrect.

summary: Bluetooth power consumption high in standby
description: Vehicle battery drains faster with Bluetooth enabled even when no devices connected.
root_cause: Bluetooth not entering low power sniff mode during idle periods. Radio always active.

summary: Boot process creates excessive log messages
description: Boot logs consuming 50MB of storage per boot. Log partition fills quickly.
root_cause: Debug logging level enabled in production build. Verbose logging should be disabled.

description: Cannot switch from master to slave role causing connection issues with certain devices.
root_cause: Bluetooth role switch feature disabled in controller configuration.

description: System extremely slow with constant disk activity. Memory subsystem thrashing.
root_cause: Active application working set exceeds physical RAM. Excessive paging to swap space.

description: Kernel slab allocator caches consuming increasing memory not released under pressure.
root_cause: Slab shrinking disabled or ineffective. Kernel caches not responding to memory pressure.

description: Random crashes with heap corruption detected error in various applications.
root_cause: Custom memory allocator has buffer overflow bug in allocation metadata management.

summary: Boot time regression after software update
description: After OTA update boot time increased from 45 seconds to 78 seconds.
root_cause: New version added synchronous initialization of cloud services in boot path. Should be async.

summary: Audio sample rate conversion causing artifacts
description: When playing 48kHz audio digital artifacts and aliasing audible.
root_cause: Sample rate converter using low quality linear interpolation. Should use higher order filter.

summary: Dual display initialization fails during boot
description: Secondary display remains black after boot while primary display works fine.
root_cause: Secondary display controller initialization not included in boot sequence. Display stays disabled.

description: BLE advertisement payload missing data. Only first 10 bytes transmitted.
root_cause: BLE advertising data length field incorrect. Payload truncated due to size miscalculation.

summary: Surround sound only works in parking mode
description: 5.1 audio mode disabled when vehicle speed above 0. Only stereo available while driving.
root_cause: Safety feature incorrectly disabling surround based on speed. Configuration error in audio policy.

summary: System panics when removing USB device during access
description: Unplugging USB drive while accessing files causes kernel panic and crash.
root_cause: USB mass storage driver not handling device removal gracefully. Memory access fault.

summary: Bluetooth connection lost when WiFi enabled
description: Enabling WiFi causes Bluetooth connection to drop. Both can't work simultaneously.
root_cause: WiFi and Bluetooth sharing same antenna. Antenna switch control not arbitrating properly.

description: Can pair with any device using fixed PIN 0000 security vulnerability.
root_cause: Bluetooth PIN should be randomized but hardcoded to default value.

description: Navigation voice guidance and TTS announcements sound robotic and distorted.
root_cause: TTS engine output sample rate mismatch with audio mixer input. Resampling quality poor.

description: Cannot fork new processes - process ID space exhausted.
root_cause: PID namespace not configured. Default PID range insufficient for long running system.

summary: Audio crossfade between tracks not working
description: Gapless playback works but crossfade feature doesn't overlap tracks.
root_cause: Audio player not pre-buffering next track for crossfade. Feature implemented but broken.

summary: Bluetooth connection drops when multiple BLE devices active
description: With 3+ BLE sensors connected classic Bluetooth phone connection unstable.
root_cause: Bluetooth controller scheduler favoring LE connections. Classic connection events being skipped.

summary: Bluetooth MAC address changing causing issues
description: Same phone appears as different device after each pairing. Previous pairing lost.
root_cause: Phone using Bluetooth privacy feature (MAC randomization). System not handling address rotation.

description: After 30 minutes of high volume playback audio completely stops. Resumes after 10 minute cool-down period.
root_cause: Amplifier thermal protection triggering prematurely. Inadequate heatsink design causing overtemperature condition.

summary: Boot from SD card slower than eMMC
description: When booting from SD card boot time is 2x slower than internal eMMC storage.
root_cause: SD card using default 25MHz clock. Should use high speed 50MHz mode for better performance.

description: Long running system starts failing memory allocations despite showing available memory.
root_cause: Heap severely fragmented from mixed allocation sizes. No compaction or large block availability.

summary: DAB Radio station list not updating
description: Digital Radio station list becomes stale. New stations in area not discovered during scan.
root_cause: DAB ensemble scanning stops after first ensemble found. Scan algorithm doesn't iterate through all frequency bands.

description: Network operations fail after system runs for several days. Connection attempts rejected.
root_cause: Network socket buffers allocated from fixed pool. Leaked sockets consuming all buffers.

description: Boot scripts timing out before completion on slower hardware variants.
root_cause: Boot script timeout hardcoded to 30 seconds. Should scale based on system performance.

description: Boot logs show services restarting repeatedly in crash loop.
root_cause: Service crash detected but no exponential backoff in restart policy. Continuous restart attempts.

summary: Auxiliary audio input has poor quality
description: 3.5mm AUX input audio quality noticeably worse than other sources.
root_cause: AUX input using wrong ADC gain settings. Input level too low causing noise.

description: Switching active connection between two paired phones takes 5+ seconds.
root_cause: Multipoint implementation using full disconnect/reconnect instead of role switch.

description: Pairing fails because numeric comparison dialog dismissed too quickly.
root_cause: SSP numeric comparison timeout set to 10 seconds. Should be 30 seconds for user response.

summary: Image cache not clearing old entries
description: Photo viewer cache grows to fill all available storage over time.
root_cause: Image cache using LRU eviction but size limit not configured. Cache never cleared.

summary: System log daemon consuming excessive CPU
description: log daemon process using 45% CPU constantly degrading overall system performance.
root_cause: Log daemon performing synchronous disk writes for every log message. Should use buffering.

description: Notification service memory usage growing 1MB per hour of operation.
root_cause: Dismissed notifications not removed from internal list. Notification history unbounded.

description: Applications closed but memory usage doesn't decrease. Shared libraries remaining loaded.
root_cause: Dynamic libraries loaded with RTLD_NODELETE flag preventing unload. Libraries stay in memory after app exit.

description: Automatic volume leveling creates unnatural pumping breathing effect in audio.
root_cause: AGC attack/release times too fast. Normalization reacting to transients instead of average level.

summary: Boot network interface not coming up
description: Ethernet interface doesn't activate during boot. Network unavailable until manual ifup command.
root_cause: Network interface initialization script timing out. DHCP client not starting automatically.
